title: ResMed Fiscal Year 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary source for ResMed's business segments, device and mask revenue, competition, patents, warranties, risks, and FY2025 profitability.

title: ResMed Announces Results for the Third Quarter of Fiscal Year 2026
note: Latest quarterly investor-relations source for FY26 revenue growth, margins, operating income, net income, and product-region revenue trends.

title: ResMed Market Capitalization
note: Point-in-time market capitalization source used for the registry market-cap metric.

title: ResMed P/E Ratio
note: Point-in-time public-market source for ResMed's trailing P/E ratio.

title: AirSense 11 CPAP Device for Sleep Apnea
note: Product source for AirSense 11 device positioning, myAir access, models, touchscreen features, and therapy support claims.

title: myAir Coaching App for Sleep Apnea
note: Product source for ResMed's patient-facing therapy data, coaching, and AirSense/AirCurve app workflow.

title: CPAP Masks
note: Product source for ResMed's AirFit mask family, mask categories, fit factors, featured masks, and replacement-parts context.

title: OSCAR - Open Source CPAP Analysis Reporter
note: Open-source CPAP data-analysis source used as the strongest existing open alternative around ResMed's therapy data layer.

title: Quality Management System Regulation
note: Regulatory source explaining QMSR and ISO 13485 quality-system expectations for finished medical-device manufacturers.

title: Open Source Hardware Basics
note: Reference source for open-hardware requirements around public design files, bills of materials, licensing, documentation, and certification.

title: Customized Facial Constant Positive Air Pressure (CPAP) Masks
note: Research source for scan-based personalized CPAP mask design and 3D-printing-enabled custom mask manufacturing.
